properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the land of fadeless days Lies the city four square It shall never pass away And there is no night there

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: God shall wipe away all tears There's no death, no pain no fear (And they count time not by years For there is no night there) :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There they need no sunshine bright In the city four square For the Lamb is all the light And there is no night there

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There the gates shall never close In that city four square There life's crystal river flows And there is no night there
